Last Wednesday was a heartbreaking day for all of us. It will remain a dark day in our nation’s history.

During these past 4 years, the President has done nothing but attempt to weaken our democracy for his own gain — and last week, armed insurrectionists took orders from him and attacked our nation’s Capitol in order to prevent the peaceful transfer of power.

Friend,

What I’m about to tell you is of the utmost importance.

Violence has no place in our politics. Period. I wholly condemned last week’s senseless acts of violence, and I strongly reiterate the calls to remain peaceful in the weeks ahead.

Those who partook in the assault on our nation’s Capitol and those who continue to threaten violence should be found, held accountable, and prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law. Let me be clear: Anyone who has malicious intent is not welcome in Washington, D.C. or in any other State Capitol Building.

The peaceful transition of power is one of our nation’s founding principles and is necessary for our country to move forward. Now is the time to come together as one nation, united in the peaceful pursuit of our common democratic purpose.

Our Founding Fathers established a Nation of laws, not a Nation of anarchy. And, the Republican Party is the Party of individual freedom, liberty, entrepreneurship, innovation, and the American Dream, not the hateful violence we witnessed last week.

God bless you and God bless the United States of America.

Thank you,

Ronna McDaniel

Chairwoman

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Voice Your Opposition to Impeachment
body:
| |
---
Just a few moments ago, we released a statement opposing the House’s vote to impeach President Trump. Here is what I said:
|
---
_“We oppose today’s action to impeach President Trump because we believe in the rule of law, and because we support the president’s right to speak freely, and because we do not believe that President Trump incited insurrection._

_“The article of impeachment asserts that President Trump incited insurrection, without offering any specific evidence of language to incite. The Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled in a 2018 case that ‘What is required to forfeit constitutional protection is incitement speech that specifically advocates for listeners to take unlawful action.’ The president did no such thing. What he did instead was to urge his listeners peaceably to petition our government for redress of specific grievances, which is not only lawful, but also foundational to our system of self-government._

_“What unfolded at the Capitol by some rally attendees was shameful and unlawful conduct. It was clearly done despite what President Trump urged – the peaceful exercise of our Constitutional rights. To assign blame to the president for the criminal acts of certain people requires a gross distortion of the clear language he used._

_“Further, the House is rushing to judgment. No hearings have been held, no witnesses have offered testimony, and no facts have been entered into the record._

_“Moreover, we believe it is time to heal, and we believe this effort to impeach the president will only fuel further discord. This is not the way to unite us._

_“Consequently, we oppose this effort to impeach the president, and urge its defeat.”_
|
---

clean_body: | | Just a few moments ago, we released a statement opposing the House’s vote to impeach President Trump. Here is what I said: | “We oppose today’s action to impeach President Trump because we believe in the rule of law, and because we support the president’s right to speak freely, and because we do not believe that President Trump incited insurrection. “The article of impeachment asserts that President Trump incited insurrection, without offering any specific evidence of language to incite. The Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled in a 2018 case that ‘What is required to forfeit constitutional protection is incitement speech that specifically advocates for listeners to take unlawful action.’ The president did no such thing. What he did instead was to urge his listeners peaceably to petition our government for redress of specific grievances, which is not only lawful, but also foundational to our system of self-government. “What unfolded at the Capitol by some rally attendees was shameful and unlawful conduct. It was clearly done despite what President Trump urged – the peaceful exercise of our Constitutional rights. To assign blame to the president for the criminal acts of certain people requires a gross distortion of the clear language he used. “Further, the House is rushing to judgment. No hearings have been held, no witnesses have offered testimony, and no facts have been entered into the record. “Moreover, we believe it is time to heal, and we believe this effort to impeach the president will only fuel further discord. This is not the way to unite us. “Consequently, we oppose this effort to impeach the president, and urge its defeat.” | Please to let them know you oppose this divisive and politically motivated impeachment sham today. sen. name: Dean Browning
subject: President Trump Twitter Ban
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I wanted to take a moment to reflect on Twitter permanently suspending President Donald J. Trump's account. Regardless of your thoughts on our current President, an assault on our individual freedom is now underway. When the President of the United States cannot effectively relay information to the people, we have a problem. And when he cannot relay that information because one company has simply decided to ban him, we have authoritarianism. Twitter has absolutely ZERO right to ban the President of the United States. For one, they are a publicly-traded company. The CEO of Twitter cannot simply do as he pleases with no regard to the public. Secondly, Twitter is different from a company such as Home Depot; for example, while Home Depot simply sells goods, Twitter fosters the free flow of information and communication. This means that Twitter has a responsibility to the public and the common good. Thus Twitter is treated as a platform for the First Amendment. By banning a public figure, not to mention our President, they are inherently working against the public, against the common good, and against the First Amendment. As American citizens, it is our duty to uphold the Constitution and ensure our liberties are NEVER infringed upon. Twitter has gone too far, and blatantly violated the First Amendment. We need to take action to ensure our right to Freedom of Speech is never infringed. [Will you help us fight back against Twitter by donating $25, $15, or even just $5 today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GfmK0hIed0878b-yrlLIWBLyoOU30__Yt1GFuCOGpd0tJWN-tuKd2r8tIQJYwt12rIy4y1xmWkyZVrTE4OkzhWk0X14nUKYZ9KKHf20QGx8lKZt9FUjzqQRzoh6W6R676vOGTePHULbzY_QRqlt03tXGTNt5Jir1q5Qhcd24xqpU1ySAdEDcedQHDZP60sQOJ_s_pcdmKqA=&c=_fUqjjGx8hFbrj0AyDF7rpMkJxcNFrBwdtSLtROUxzU5rWkbxlcM3w==&ch=PV01hAqpPa1oV-DoUAaBalwDm4ub16Muy1VuA5aI1k5Rw0kDeQDhuQ==)?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on Twitter permanently suspending President Donald J. Trump's account. Regardless of your thoughts on our current President, an assault on our individual freedom is now underway. When the President of the United States cannot effectively relay information to the people, we have a problem. And when he cannot relay that information because one company has simply decided to ban him, we have authoritarianism. Twitter has absolutely ZERO right to ban the President of the United States. For one, they are a publicly-traded company. The CEO of Twitter cannot simply do as he pleases with no regard to the public. Secondly, Twitter is different from a company such as Home Depot; for example, while Home Depot simply sells goods, Twitter fosters the free flow of information and communication. This means that Twitter has a responsibility to the public and the common good. Thus Twitter is treated as a platform for the First Amendment. By banning a public figure, not to mention our President, they are inherently working against the public, against the common good, and against the First Amendment. As American citizens, it is our duty to uphold the Constitution and ensure our liberties are NEVER infringed upon. Twitter has gone too far, and blatantly violated the First Amendment. We need to take action to ensure our right to Freedom of Speech is never infringed. ==? | | | == | Our only hope is that enough red-blooded, god-fearing patriots say enough is enough and fight back against the Big Tech monopolies who want to silence our voices! name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Four more years of One Indiana for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb is proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish in just four short years –– but our work is far from over. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|

Friend,

**The first four years of building One Indiana for All are in the books –– and the next four years are underway!**

_**“Over these past four years, we’ve set all-time records in job commitments coming to Indiana in the quality of those jobs as measured by salary and in capital investment. Even this past year, during the pandemic, we added a record 31,000 new job commitments.”**_
**– Governor Eric Holcomb**

Governor Holcomb is proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish in just a matter of four short years –– we’ve set job commitment records, strengthened our infrastructure, improved our talent development and retention efforts, attacked COVID-19 and the drug epidemic head on, and we’ve built a strong foundation of economic stability in Indiana.

On Monday, Governor Holcomb was sworn in to lead Indiana for a second term, and he is ready to continue meeting Indiana’s greatest challenges head on.

**_“I remain convinced that, for Indiana, the future is now. And I’ll work every day to make that future a reality for all of us.”_ \- Governor Eric Holcomb**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting for you
body:
Happy New Year greetings from Judicial Watch! I hope 2021 brings happiness, good health and prosperity to you and everyone close to you.

| |

|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

2020 was a year of great challenges for our nation...and Judicial Watch continued to make history by fighting for the rule of law...for the American people's right to know...and for accountability from our government.
**And as****we head into 2021, I ask you to _[support Judicial Watch with your best tax-deductible contribution now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMTMxNTM5MDQ=)_**
**I especially hope you will _[donate now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMTMxNTM5MDQ=)_ because **your support has a direct impact on our ability to stay on track with existing programs and expand into other key programs critical to our mission of fighting for the rule of law and open government.
With your **_[best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMTMxNTM5MDQ=)_** , in 2021 Judicial Watch will:
* **Keep fighting to keep our elections honest;**

* **Keep digging into serious allegations of Biden family corruption and influence peddling;**

* **Keep fighting to shut down sanctuary cities;**

* **Keep fighting for accountability in Congress;**

* **Keep fighting to get to the truth about the Obama-Clinton scandals;**

* **_And in 2021 we will not give the Deep State a pass on its illegal secrecy._**

I hope these brief bullet points of our 2021 plans reminds you of how important our work continues to be as we confront dishonest politicians of _both_ political parties _and_ combat unlawful government secrecy. And I hope you realize that without **_[your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMTMxNTM5MDQ=)_** we cannot sustain our high-level impact on the challenges that 2021 will bring.
Since 1994, Judicial Watch has fought for accountability, the rule of law and the people's "right to know." We are independent of political parties. As our remarkable record shows, we are _best_ qualified to police our government and protect our constitutional system. _We rely on you_ , as we have always relied on the selfless support of patriotic Americans _to help give us the resources we need_.
I want to wish you and those close to you a very Happy New Year. I thank you again for your generous past support. I trust I can count on you to stand with us in 2021 **_[by making your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMTMxNTM5MDQ=)_**!
Yours truly,

Thomas Fitton

name: Rick Scott
subject: Looking ahead
body:
Retaking the Senate majority is vitally important to the future of our country and to preserving the American dream. With your help, I know we can win.

Friend,

I am proud to have been voted by my colleagues as the Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. [**Together, we are going to retake our Senate Majority.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013nnCsQqavBTLncJo1H5HPRt4-aBXMLIGLU9_9H5FWTnZPdbZ_9dg-hZewnthHl4mpep2L9lWJc0VIfHIkE7lw0aZh9LLff_urulVNosjOdV1sua98IzSrjUZsnbNrUsNEcQv0plWmjn9PnWF9NJ4c1q48xP-v9nxyApOeL38ET-wUOMAFFcLJRRcGHCbzYQ4GdKbDzX8q4ug91U7nfpCYHU0uUK3wQawDUHHD7Bqc9nRcpfXI-djowjWZxaRLJPsRR3Jzd3STIUDnaANYotnplRB02UXLskLeLtIyuOzLnWDmHCvQTYkrH9_gh_1HkToG-Krbb898ycCzEtfwtCHYST11PqWZOc7T6dSzwV47KA8V2Ep3EBzQOvfzrSHhFAfpj_laHjU-hQ=&c=9T8O-N3h8s7i5Ww_gmEifzEp5imT6KKLdy6KgjgyzpJLHRsjO7QCCA==&ch=VmN4RWU9PQn3abgVcjeeOuSEDIZoNYjlpxZOEjH_8MLIwGR6AS5vkw==)

Republicans across the nation will fight for lower taxes, better jobs and opportunity, a secure border, and safe communities. With your help we will stand up for our shared values.

[** _Retaking the Senate majority is vitally important to the future of our country and to preserving the American dream. With your help, I know we can win._**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013nnCsQqavBTLncJo1H5HPRt4-aBXMLIGLU9_9H5FWTnZPdbZ_9dg-hZewnthHl4mpep2L9lWJc0VIfHIkE7lw0aZh9LLff_urulVNosjOdV1sua98IzSrjUZsnbNrUsNEcQv0plWmjn9PnWF9NJ4c1q48xP-v9nxyApOeL38ET-wUOMAFFcLJRRcGHCbzYQ4GdKbDzX8q4ug91U7nfpCYHU0uUK3wQawDUHHD7Bqc9nRcpfXI-djowjWZxaRLJPsRR3Jzd3STIUDnaANYotnplRB02UXLskLeLtIyuOzLnWDmHCvQTYkrH9_gh_1HkToG-Krbb898ycCzEtfwtCHYST11PqWZOc7T6dSzwV47KA8V2Ep3EBzQOvfzrSHhFAfpj_laHjU-hQ=&c=9T8O-N3h8s7i5Ww_gmEifzEp5imT6KKLdy6KgjgyzpJLHRsjO7QCCA==&ch=VmN4RWU9PQn3abgVcjeeOuSEDIZoNYjlpxZOEjH_8MLIwGR6AS5vkw==)

We know what the Democrats' agenda will be - socialism, Medicare-for-all, defunding the police, and the Green New Deal.

_We can 't let them take even an inch towards enacting these dangerous policies._

[**Winning will take all of us, that 's why I'm reaching out to you early. I'm counting on YOU to be on our team like you have in the past. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013nnCsQqavBTLncJo1H5HPRt4-aBXMLIGLU9_9H5FWTnZPdbZ_9dg-hZewnthHl4mpep2L9lWJc0VIfHIkE7lw0aZh9LLff_urulVNosjOdV1sua98IzSrjUZsnbNrUsNEcQv0plWmjn9PnWF9NJ4c1q48xP-v9nxyApOeL38ET-wUOMAFFcLJRRcGHCbzYQ4GdKbDzX8q4ug91U7nfpCYHU0uUK3wQawDUHHD7Bqc9nRcpfXI-djowjWZxaRLJPsRR3Jzd3STIUDnaANYotnplRB02UXLskLeLtIyuOzLnWDmHCvQTYkrH9_gh_1HkToG-Krbb898ycCzEtfwtCHYST11PqWZOc7T6dSzwV47KA8V2Ep3EBzQOvfzrSHhFAfpj_laHjU-hQ=&c=9T8O-N3h8s7i5Ww_gmEifzEp5imT6KKLdy6KgjgyzpJLHRsjO7QCCA==&ch=VmN4RWU9PQn3abgVcjeeOuSEDIZoNYjlpxZOEjH_8MLIwGR6AS5vkw==)

This cycle, there will be elections for 34 Senate seats across the country. 20 Republican-held seats and 14 Democrat-held seats will be up for grabs. We need to be ready.

**I 'm confident that our message will continue to resonate with the American people! Senate Republicans won't stop fighting for YOU. **[**Pitch in now to join us in this fight and help take back the Senate.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013nnCsQqavBTLncJo1H5HPRt4-aBXMLIGLU9_9H5FWTnZPdbZ_9dg-hZewnthHl4mpep2L9lWJc0VIfHIkE7lw0aZh9LLff_urulVNosjOdV1sua98IzSrjUZsnbNrUsNEcQv0plWmjn9PnWF9NJ4c1q48xP-v9nxyApOeL38ET-wUOMAFFcLJRRcGHCbzYQ4GdKbDzX8q4ug91U7nfpCYHU0uUK3wQawDUHHD7Bqc9nRcpfXI-djowjWZxaRLJPsRR3Jzd3STIUDnaANYotnplRB02UXLskLeLtIyuOzLnWDmHCvQTYkrH9_gh_1HkToG-Krbb898ycCzEtfwtCHYST11PqWZOc7T6dSzwV47KA8V2Ep3EBzQOvfzrSHhFAfpj_laHjU-hQ=&c=9T8O-N3h8s7i5Ww_gmEifzEp5imT6KKLdy6KgjgyzpJLHRsjO7QCCA==&ch=VmN4RWU9PQn3abgVcjeeOuSEDIZoNYjlpxZOEjH_8MLIwGR6AS5vkw==)

body:
Did you see my announcement? Read more >>>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/d75a84523bdf6ac4c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Dear friend, Since I launched by Gubernatorial Exploratory Committee last week, there has been a tremendous outpouring of support for our cause. People are energized and ready to bring balance back to Sacramento. I made the announcement on Fox and Friends. You can watch it **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/6bbf3f6fbe95429dc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. Here is what the media had to say: “[H]e represents the Republican Party’s best chance of electing a governor in a state that has turned increasingly blue over the last decade.” (**[The Hill](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/78e7e5d61d51976bc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**) “Newsom could face a formidable opponent.” (**[Breitbart](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/22b7c20f76e42d0bc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**) “’[T]he GOP hasn’t had a candidate for Governor who had that kind of experience going in for a long time. It’s a definite edge.’” (**[California Globe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/9ae46710dc206be0c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**) “’[H]e really could give Gavin Newsom a run for his money.’’’ (**[Politico](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/3d3ed77c01553468/1e321486d7556df6c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**) California desperately needs change at the top. Between the mismanagement during key points of the pandemic, the toxic business environment, the shaky economy, the disappearing jobs, the rolling blackouts, the missing unemployment checks and billions of dollars in fraud, and of course the skyrocketing homelessness, I strongly believe we need new leadership in the Governor’s office. # [Most Illegal Immigrants Arrested by ICE in 2020 Had Average of Four Criminal Convictions or Charges](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52589&L=21777&F=H&)
The overwhelming majority of illegal immigrants arrested by federal authorities in 2020 had an average of four criminal convictions or charges, according to a year-end report published by the government. In the document Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reveals it arrested 103,603 illegal aliens last fiscal year with a total of more than 374,000 convictions and charges. Driving under the influence was the most popular conviction or charge at 74,000, followed by drug crimes (67,000), assaults (37,000), sex offenses (10,000), robberies (3,800), homicides (1,900) and kidnappings (1,600).
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52589&L=21777&F=H&)

The videos show the covered body of Mr. Lemp; detained individuals in the house; and various weapons found at the scene. Judicial Watch blurred images of occupants of the house who appear in the video to protect their privacy. clean_body: The overwhelming majority of illegal immigrants arrested by federal authorities in 2020 had an average of four criminal convictions or charges, according to a year-end report published by the government. | | | Because no one is above the law! | January 13, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == The overwhelming majority of illegal immigrants arrested by federal authorities in 2020 had an average of four criminal convictions or charges, according to a year-end report published by the government. In the document Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) reveals it arrested 103,603 illegal aliens last fiscal year with a total of more than 374,000 convictions and charges. Driving under the influence was the most popular conviction or charge at 74,000, followed by drug crimes (67,000), assaults (37,000), sex offenses (10,000), robberies (3,800), homicides (1,900) and kidnappings (1,600). == | | | == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced it obtained three videos of body cam footage from the Montgomery County, MD, Police Department (MCPD) detailing the scene of the fatal shooting of Duncan Socrates Lemp earlier in 2020. The videos show the covered body of Mr. Lemp; detained individuals in the house; and various weapons found at the scene. Judicial Watch blurred images of occupants of the house who appear in the video to protect their privacy. == == Judicial Watch While the nation was preoccupied with holiday celebrations, an Al Qaeda operative incarcerated at the U.S. military jail in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba as a “forever prisoner” was cleared to be released. His name is Said Salih Said Nashir and a Department of Defense (DOD) file says he has ties to 9/11 conspirator Walid Bin Attash and trained at the infamous al-Faruq camp in Afghanistan to participate in terrorist operations against U.S. forces in Karachi, Pakistan and inside the U.S. == = Judicial Watch Chris Farrell, JW director of investigations and research: Communist China has been engaging in a systematic program to co-opt American higher education institutions and steal U.S. intellectual property. = | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

| | Friend, We are hopeful that the end of the COVID-19 pandemic is near, but we cannot lose sight of the Minnesotans hardest hit by this crisis. Today, the House DFL unveiled our first priorities for the 2021 legislative session. These priorities are immediate steps we can take to help workers, families, and businesses hurt the most by COVID-19:
* **Economic Security**
* Housing assistance
* Emergency payments to families most in need
* Food security
* Broadband expansion
* **Worker Protections**
* Emergency paid sick leave for health care workers
* Workers' compensation for school employees who contract COVID-19
* Getting hospitality workers back to work
* Expanding unemployment insurance to those collecting social security
* **Affordable Health Care**
* Testing, vaccination, and staffing support for long-term care
* Addressing health-related needs of those without shelter
* **Education**
* Wrap-around student supports
* Investments to address learning loss and opportunity gaps
* Funding stabilization to address temporarily decreased enrollment
* **Child Care**
* Child care provider grants
* Wait list reduction

This isn't an exhaustive list of everything the Minnesota House DFL will work on this session, but it's a start. **We are just under a year into this pandemic and Minnesotans are still experiencing uncertainty in too many aspects of their life.** The legislature can and should take immediate action to ease that burden. Minnesotans deserve to not just survive, but thrive -- that's exactly what House DFLers are working toward this legislative session. Thank you, **Liz Olson** Deputy Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uo1EGvKqaMGWh-cIlmSc0DUhiXfLghuXyDxJY4c8bFk=/yXPi7SSNVYQ8L_oTzI8LLH1g6a-Hha-7DsS0gpZD9wo=?refcode=011321)

# Trump Makes History Again...
My Friend,Trump will leave power as the first president in the nation’s 245-year history to be impeached twice.Ten Republicans broke from their party. **ONLY TEN**.
There are 197 Republicans who voted against impeachment. That means there are at least 197 districts in need of an opponent in 2022. Help us build our candidate training and mentorship program.A Capitol Police officer died from injuries suffered in the riot, and police shot and killed a woman during the siege. Three other people died in what authorities said were medical emergencies. The riot delayed the tally of Electoral College votes that was the last step in finalizing Biden’s victory.A lot could happen between now and the impeachment trial but the 197 Republicans who refused to hold Trump accountable for inciting insurrection and a violent mob to storm the Capitol last week, resulting in five deaths will continue to serve their constituents .[**Help us**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=7ceca002fd&e=3f151f8b74)stand up for Democracy by electing leaders who stand up to injustice.
Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in Office
